scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,vite -c blue,green "node server/index.js" "cd dashboard && npx vite"
scripts.dev:seeded: USE_SEED=true concurrently -k -n server,vite -c blue,green "USE_SEED=true node server/index.js" "cd dashboard && VITE_USE_SEED=true npx vite"
scripts.install:all: cd dashboard && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
